query:
UPDATE wa_conversations wc
JOIN wa_contacts wct ON wc.remoteJid = wct.jid AND wc.sessionId = wct.sessionId
SET wc.contactPushName = wct.pushName
WHERE wc.sessionId = 'crm-210002-240001'
  AND (wc.contactPushName IS NULL OR wc.contactPushName = '' OR wc.contactPushName REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$')
  AND wct.pushName IS NOT NULL 
  AND wct.pushName != ''
  AND wct.pushName NOT REGEXP '^[0-9+ ()-]+$';
